fork_status_and_schedule.highlight: Glamsterdam devnets 0-3 launched; glamsterdam-devnet-2 added EIP-8061
EIP-8080 (CL side) discussed for potential DFI at next ACDC

testing_progress.highlight: bal-devnet-6 stable with Lighthouse/Lodestar; glamsterdam-devnet-3 running
bal-devnet-7 planned for next week with 8037 fixes
Optimization merges needed to bal-devnet-3 until bal-devnet-7 stable

eip_proposals.highlight: SFI definition finalized; 10 EIPs proposed for SFI status
EIP-8070 (sparse block posts) Engine API changes merged
Min reorg depth discussion: targeting 38 days (inactivity leak period)
EIP-8254 (deposit limit) needed to enable 200M gas floor
EIP-8246 (remove selfdestruct burn) has support; full removal needs more time

technical_discussions.highlight: Debug endpoint needed for state vs regular gas breakdown
Deep reorg capability: Geth supports 90K blocks, others need work
Deposit limit creates block building complexity; 512 max discussed
EIP-7709 (blockhash via storage) simplifies execution witness construction

action_items.action: Create debug gas endpoint spec in EL channel
Update EIP for 38-day reorg depth requirement
Create Hive tests for deep reorg scenarios
PFI EIP-8254 to Glamsterdam meta (deposit limit discussion ongoing)
CFI EIP-8246 (remove selfdestruct burn) to Glamsterdam

decisions.decision: SFI definition approved; EIPs moved to SFI status (excluding 8038)
Target 200M gas floor for Glamsterdam (pending deposit limit fix)
Remove selfdestruct burn feature (8246); defer full removal to Hegota
